mapper.select: SELECT cc.*, cc.is_anonymous AS anonymous, u.name AS user_name, u.status AS user_status FROM community_comment cc JOIN users u ON cc.user_id = u.id WHERE cc.post_id = #{postId} AND cc.status = #{status} ORDER BY cc.created_at ASC, cc.id ASC

SELECT cc.*, cc.is_anonymous AS anonymous, u.name AS user_name, u.status AS user_status FROM community_comment cc JOIN users u ON cc.user_id = u.id WHERE cc.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY cc.created_at ASC, cc.id ASC
SELECT cc.*, cc.is_anonymous AS anonymous, u.name AS user_name, u.status AS user_status FROM community_comment cc JOIN users u ON cc.user_id = u.id WHERE cc.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comment (post_id, user_id, parent_id, mention_user_id, content, is_anonymous, nickname_profile_id, status) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{mentionUserId}, #{content}, #{anonymous}, #{nicknameProfileId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE community_comment SET status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
UPDATE community_comment SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
UPDATE community_comment SET status = 'PUBLISHED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'HIDDEN'
